channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-03
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. Notably, the `giladfeldman/docpluck` project has released version 2.4.101, which includes updated documentation and improvements to table functionality. Meanwhile, `Davidvandijcke/coarse` has made strides in localization and has re-enabled Fable 5 in the model picker. The `giladfeldman/escicheck` project has been synced with the latest versions of `effectcheck`, bringing it up to date with versions 0.6.11 and 0.6.12. Additionally, `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` and `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` have both seen updates, with the latter adding a convenient Chrome Webstore link for Output-It-Forward. These connections between projects demonstrate the collaborative spirit of our community, and we celebrate the progress being made across the board.

41 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

Most active:

regcheck19 commits
docpluck11 commits
escicheck5 commits
metacheck4 commits
coarse2 commits

item.title: docpluck: 5 commits today
item.description:
giladfeldman/docpluck

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, with multiple commits made to it. The documentation was updated to archive the source findings and specification, and to remove resolved reconciliation handoffs, as stated in the commit message "docs: archive source FINDINGS + spec, remove resolved reconciliation handoffs". Additionally, the documentation was updated for the release, with the addition of the v2.4.101 CHANGELOG and reconciliation findings, as noted in the commit "docs(release): v2.4.101 CHANGELOG + reconciliation FINDINGS". The table functionality was also modified, with commits to strip the LONG caption-tail prose header, fix the efendic T3 running-header, and strip the T2-5 caption-tail-prose, as well as to reconcile concurrent table-capture sessions onto greedy+rescue, with a version bump to v2.4.101.

5 commit(s) today:

  • 1a7f8be [main] docs: archive source FINDINGS + spec, remove resolved reconciliation handoffs — Gilad Feldman
  • 0f5dba9 [main] docs(release): v2.4.101 CHANGELOG + reconciliation FINDINGS — Gilad Feldman
  • 53fde8d [main] fix(tables): strip LONG caption-tail prose header + version bump v2.4.101 — Gilad Feldman
  • 819902e [main] fix(tables): efendic T3 running-header + T2-5 caption-tail-prose strip — Gilad Feldman
  • c7246f4 [main] wip(tables): reconcile concurrent table-capture sessions onto greedy+rescue — Gilad Feldman
  • 8559c23 [main] fix(tables): v2.4.100 — bmc_med_3 duplicate-fragment pairing (narrow duplicate-starvation rescue) — Gilad Feldman
  • 4cea4c6 [main] docs+skill: R-0040 verified diagnosis + R-0512 ESCIcheck corpus path fix — Gilad Feldman
  • 03e5d55 [main] chore(release): v2.4.99 — region-driven table capture (version bump + CHANGELOG) — Gilad Feldman
  • b0fdd5f [main] fix(skills): correct stale PDFextractor/docpluck paths to MetaScienceTools/ layout — Gilad Feldman
  • fd072b8 [main] feat(tables): region-driven Camelot capture + content-plausibility guards (DP-1/DP-2) — Gilad Feldman
  • b6bd65e [main] fix(tables): v2.4.98 — DP-3 η²p-from-structure, DP-5 r-cell + bracket-CI (ESCIcheck handoff; flatten-only, AI-gold-verified) — Gilad Feldman
  • 521089a [main] feat(tables): RC-T char-level column-detection fallback for tight-kerned tables (v2.4.98, foundation) — Gilad Feldman
  • 976af30 [main] docs(iterate): 2026-06-25 run handoff + LEARNINGS + project lessons (PARTIAL) — Gilad Feldman
  • 59cff5b [main] fix(tooling): direction-aware check_app_pin_sync note + RC-T/RC-1 spec findings — Gilad Feldman
  • 3e9cc2c [feat/rc-t-table-region-guard] docs(learnings): RC-T Layer-2 + combined-ship closeout (cycle 2, v2.4.97) — Gilad Feldman
  • 813aa4c [feat/rc-t-table-region-guard] fix(tables): v2.4.97 — DP-2 blank p/df + DP-5 two-header-row recovery/super-header alignment + RC-T Layer-2 raw_text prose-trim/suppress — Gilad Feldman
  • 84a4d42 [feat/rc-t-table-region-guard] fix(render): RC-T — strip Camelot tables that are absorbed body prose (v2.4.96) — Gilad Feldman
  • 7247285 [feat/rc-t-table-region-guard] docs(handoff+todo): RC-T implementation handoff + log RC-T deferral / close collabra.77859 adjudication — Gilad Feldman
  • 927d869 [feat/rc-t-table-region-guard] docs(spec): RC-T table-region prose-contamination — confirmed 2-layer root cause + fix plan — Gilad Feldman
  • db7192b [feat/rc-t-table-region-guard] docs(triage+learnings): v2.4.95 corpus assessment — 7/7 canary FAIL, RC-B7 already done (W0h), RC-T root-caused — Gilad Feldman

View all commits →

item.title: coarse: 2 commits today
item.description:
Davidvandijcke/coarse

Work was done on the 'dev' and 'main' branches. On the 'dev' branch, the confirmation email and review page were localized to follow the review language, as stated in the commit message "fix(i18n): localize confirmation email + review page follows review language (#244)". The 'dev' branch also had its schema_migrations bookkeeping table updated to enable RLS, according to the commit "fix(deploy): enable RLS on schema_migrations bookkeeping table (#243)". Additionally, Fable 5 was re-enabled in the model picker on both the 'dev' and 'main' branches, as seen in the commits "fix(web): re-enable Fable 5 in the model picker". The 'dev' branch was also updated with changes from the 'main' branch and the 'release/v1.8.0' branch through merge operations.

2 commit(s) today:

  • d93b6f8 [dev] fix(web): re-enable Fable 5 in the model picker — Davidvandijcke
  • d6df84a [main] fix(web): re-enable Fable 5 in the model picker — Davidvandijcke
  • 05aad76 [main] Merge pull request #245 from Davidvandijcke/dev — David Van Dijcke
  • 49a72b3 [dev] Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/main' into sync/reconcile-v1.8.0 — Davidvandijcke
  • 2e86c5f [dev] fix(i18n): localize confirmation email + review page follows review language (#244) — David Van Dijcke
  • 907c629 [dev] Merge pull request #242 from Davidvandijcke/release/v1.8.0 — David Van Dijcke
  • f54b584 [dev] fix(deploy): enable RLS on schema_migrations bookkeeping table (#243) — David Van Dijcke
  • ba19e15 [dev] chore(release): v1.8.0 — Davidvandijcke
  • 262305d [dev] docs(experiments): record PR-F language experiment (keep Design A) (#241) — David Van Dijcke
  • 2e1c796 [dev] feat(i18n): localize setup + compare pages; follow site language (#239) (#240) — David Van Dijcke
  • ef4f2eb [feat/i18n-setup-compare] feat(i18n): localize setup + compare pages; follow site language (#239) — Davidvandijcke
  • e8c3845 [dev] feat(i18n): cross-language review-consistency eval harness (PR-F) (#236) (#238) — David Van Dijcke
  • f1fbfe9 [dev] i18n(nl): Dutch site-UI wording refinements (#235) (#237) — David Van Dijcke
  • c3370c4 [feat/237-lang-eval] feat(i18n): cross-language review-consistency eval harness (PR-F) (#236) — Davidvandijcke
  • 228b694 [feat/nl-flemish] i18n(nl): Dutch site-UI wording refinements (#235) — Davidvandijcke
  • 1910472 [dev] feat(i18n): localize status + review pages; Opus QA of all 12 catalogs (#233) (#234) — David Van Dijcke
  • 9ac6256 [feat/i18n-status-review-pages] feat(i18n): localize status + review pages; Opus QA of all 12 catalogs (#233) — Davidvandijcke
  • 8faa90a [dev] feat(i18n): localized website UI with manual language switcher (PR-H) (#231) (#232) — David Van Dijcke
  • 395a58c [feat/231-site-i18n] feat(i18n): localized website UI with manual language switcher (PR-H) (#231) — Davidvandijcke
  • eae44c1 [dev] feat(i18n): localized review headers + completion email (PR-E) (#229) (#230) — David Van Dijcke
